title: Camafy
description: This mod integrates the mods of CamaCraft with each other for a coherent gameplay experience.
body:
This mod exists for the sole purpose of bridging the gaps in our CamaCraft modpack! We add multiple items that are useful, fun, and also used as resources for additional crafting recipes in the CamaCraft modpack. Check out our official website here for more info (coming soon): 
[CAMACRAFT](https://camacraft.net/)


 

Camafy currently includes:

- ARMOR
- TOOLS
- WEAPONS
- TOOLKITS (MODPACK DEPENDENT)
- ~~DANGEROUS SNOWBALL (PVP ITEM)~~
- FOOD ITEMS
- ~~PLANTS~~
- DUNGEON DOORS (WITH RESPECTIVE KEYS)
- ~~and LOOT-TABLE MODIFICATIONS (COMING SOON)~~
Unfortunately, lots of content has been scrapped. This mod may get a complete re-work in the future. It isn't meant to be played outside of the CamaCraft modpack.
